title: linaria × hybrida
intro: Linaria × hybrida, commonly known as the toadflax or wild snapdragon, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that has been cultivated for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. This plant is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria × hybrida include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive discomfort. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
